data.title: Shiba Inu’s Hoichi Bridge Goes Live, Opening Doors to 60+ Blockchains and 1,500 Tokens
data.description:
The highly anticipated Hoichi Bridge from Shiba Inu has officially gone live, marking a significant milestone in the project’s development. This innovative bridge opens up a wide array of possibilities by connecting over 60 different blockchains and facilitating transactions involving an impressive selection of more than 1,500 tokens. This substantial expansion not only enhances the interoperability of the Shiba Inu ecosystem but also empowers users with greater flexibility and access to a diverse range of digital assets. With the launch of the Hoichi Bridge, Shiba Inu is set to revolutionize the way users engage with the blockchain space, fostering new opportunities for growth and collaboration within the cryptocurrency community.
source: https://blocknews.com/shiba-inus-hoichi-bridge-live-opening-doors-to-60-blockchains-and-1500-tokens/

data.title: Bitcoin News: Owning BTC Disallowed For Lawmakers Per Pennsylvania HB 1812 Bill
data.description:
In recent Bitcoin news on the regulatory front, Lawmakers in the U. S might soon not be allowed to buy Bitcoin. This is because of the Pennsylvania HB 1812 bill which proposes banning public officials and their families from owning BTC
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/22/bitcoin-news-owning-btc-disallowed-for-lawmakers-per-pennsylvania-hb-1812-bill/

data.title: VanEck files for an S-1 application for a JitoSOL ETF
data.description:
VanEck has filed with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to launch the first-ever spot Solana exchange-traded fund (ETF) fully backed by liquid staking tokens. The JitoSol ETF is in partnership with Jito Labs. According to a Form S-1 filed by VanEck Digital Assets on August 22, the proposed JitoSOL ETF aims to track […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vaneck-files-for-s-1-application-jitosol-etf/

data.title: ASIC Removes 14,000 Scam Sites in Two Years, Crypto Fraud Accounts for 20% of Takedowns
data.description:
Australian Securities and Investments Commission has removed more than 14,000 investment scam and phishing websites since July 2023 with crypto investment scams accounting for approximately 3,015 takedowns or 20% of all removals.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/asic-removes-14000-scam-sites-in-two-years-crypto-fraud-accounts-for-20-of-takedowns/

data.title: SEC Cryptocurrency Task Force Hosts Nationwide Roundtable Series
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) Cryptocurrency Task Force is conducting a nationwide tour to host a series of roundtable meetings. The initiative aims to engage with groups that previously could not attend meetings in Washington and those historically underrepresented in policy-making processes. Recognizing the significant impact of any regulatory framework, the task force seeks to ensure comprehensive communication and dialogue.

The schedule for the task force's tour is as follows:

- August 4: Berkeley, California

- August 19: Boston

- September 4: Dallas

- September 15: Chicago

- September 25: New York City

- October 2: Los Angeles

- October 24: Cleveland

- October 29: Scottsdale, Arizona

- November 12: New York City

- December 5: Ann Arbor, Michigan

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation News: Lawmakers Split on Crypto Policy and Wyoming Launches Stablecoin
data.description:

data.title: SharpLink Gaming Reveals Aggressive Ethereum-Backed Buyback Program: Is Now the Time to Buy ETH?
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming has officially announced a bold and aggressive buyback program backed by Ethereum, prompting investors and crypto enthusiasts alike to consider whether this is the opportune moment to invest in Ethereum. As the company takes significant steps to enhance its market position and potentially drive up the value of ETH, many are left wondering if this initiative signals a turning point for the cryptocurrency and what implications it may have for future investments.
source: https://blocknews.com/sharplink-gaming-reveals-aggressive-ethereum-backed-buyback-program-is-now-the-time-to-buy-eth/

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Cap Surges to $4.125 Trillion
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the total market capitalization of cryptocurrencies has risen to $4.125 trillion, marking a 5.4% increase over the past 24 hours. The 24-hour trading volume reached $195.0946 billion. Bitcoin's market capitalization stands at $2.33 trillion, while Ethereum's market cap is at $578.899 billion.
